a260706p10.summary: The country benefited from a jobs boom after attracting US multinationals, but some of these roles are being cut in the name of AI efficiency.
a260706p10.title: AI-driven drops in labor income and gains in capital income could hit Ireland's tax base, with 6%+ of its workforce in tech and heavy exposure to US companies (Olivia Fletcher/Bloomberg)

a260706p11.summary: The humanoid robotics market is awash in money right now. Last week, AI2 Robotics, a Shenzhen-based startup that makes wheeled humanoid robots …
a260706p11.title: An interview with Agility Robotics CEO Peggy Johnson on why the startup is going public via a SPAC, the physical layer as its core advantage, safety, and more (Connie Loizos/TechCrunch)

a260706p12.summary: Avoiding old-school labor ideology, a new generation of tech workers finds itself divided by the AI boom. — As recently as late May, Choi Seung-ho was hailed as a hero.
a260706p12.title: A profile of Samsung union leader Choi Seung-ho, who helped win a ~$26B bonus package for chip employees, as he tries to resolve the rift over bonus gaps (Yoolim Lee/Bloomberg)

a260706p13.summary: The veteran investor has put himself at the centre of the global AI boom. Some think he now has too much control
a260706p13.title: How Masayoshi Son is remaking SoftBank in his own image, betting on AI; SoftBank trades at a ~50% discount to its net asset value, as some question his strategy (David Keohane/Financial Times)

a260706p14.summary: Csquare Inc., a data center company backed by Brookfield Corp., is seeking to raise as much as $1.35 billion in a US initial public offering.
a260706p14.title: Filing: Brookfield-backed data center company Csquare seeks to raise up to $1.35B in an IPO, selling 50M shares at $23 to $27 each for an up to $4.18B valuation (Ryan Vlastelica/Bloomberg)

a260706p15.summary: Bespoke Labs, an AI agent training platform, raised $40 million across seed and Series A funding, CEO Mahesh Sathiamoorthy tells Axios exclusively.
a260706p15.title: AI agent training platform Bespoke Labs raised $40M across a seed led by 8VC and a Series A led by Wing, saying the funding gives it almost two years of runway (Natalie Breymeyer/Axios)

a260706p16.summary: Anthropic on Monday signed a 20-year lease to use a TeraWulf data center in Kentucky. — The data center, located about an hour southwest …
a260706p16.title: Anthropic signs a 20-year, ~$19B lease to use a TeraWulf data center in Kentucky, set to have a ~400MW capacity and to start delivering power in H2 2027 (CNBC)

a260706p17.summary: Broadcom (AVGO.O) said on Monday it has agreed to expand its partnership with Apple (AAPL.O) through 2031 to develop and supply custom chips …
a260706p17.title: Broadcom agrees to expand its Apple partnership through 2031 to develop and supply custom chips; in 2023, the companies announced a multibillion-dollar 5G deal (Akash Sriram/Reuters)

a260706p18.summary: Reddit Inc. is battling a new kind of spam: stealth marketing content created by brands that want to get mentioned …
a260706p18.title: Reddit says its AI-powered content moderation systems caught 25K "spammy posts and comments" per day in Q1, reducing users' exposure to such content by 20% YoY (Natalie Lung/Bloomberg)

a260706p19.summary: Most of the job losses are in Microsoft's Xbox and commercial sales organizations. … A year after cutting around 9,100 employees …
a260706p19.title: Memo: Microsoft is laying off ~4,800 employees, or ~2.1% of its workforce; most are in sales or Xbox, where ~20% of jobs are set to be cut by the end of FY 2027 (Tom Warren/The Verge)

a260706p20.summary: Compulsion and Double Fine studios will become independent; Undead Labs and Ninja Theory will be sold.
a260706p20.title: Memo: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma says the unit will divest five studios, including Ninja Theory, alongside 3,200 job cuts, to streamline the business, in a "reset" (Bloomberg)

a260706p6.summary: South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix (000660.KS) on Monday launched a U.S. share sale to raise 43 trillion won ($28.07 billion) …
a260706p6.title: SK Hynix launches a US share sale on the Nasdaq to raise ~$28B, selling 17.79M new shares; the final listing price is due Thursday before trading starts Friday (Reuters)

a260706p7.summary: Meta and Snap rolled out new smart glasses last month, the latest sign that the industry is racing to put a camera and an AI assistant onto users' faces.
a260706p7.title: Shenzhen-based Even Realities, a startup that makes smart glasses without cameras, raised a $150M pre-Series B led by Meituan and Tencent (Kate Park/TechCrunch)

a260706p8.summary: Quick Take — Ripple said it received CASP authorization from Luxembourg's CSSF, making it fully MiCA-compliant to offer crypto services across 30 EEA countries.
a260706p8.title: Ripple secures CASP authorization from Luxembourg's financial regulator, making it fully MiCA-compliant to offer crypto services across 30 EEA countries (Brian Danga/The Block)

a260706p9.summary: It takes effort to be an informed citizen. Artificial intelligence tools offer an alluring shortcut — but they're not without risk.
a260706p9.title: Some US voters are using AI tools as nonpartisan researchers, seeing them as a viable alternative to traditional news coverage, voter guides, and social media (Jennifer Medina/New York Times)
